description_enus:
The Carrion Bird screeches, causing Mortal Wounds on the target.

Mortal Wounds
Grievously wounds the target, reducing the effectiveness of any healing received for 10 sec.
Puts your pet in stealth mode, but slows its movement speed by 50%. The first attack from stealth receives a 20% bonus to damage.  Lasts until cancelled.

The Tallstrider kicks up a cloud of dust towards the target, slowing movement by 50% for 6 sec.
